testcase.name: test_sandbox_start_status_proxy
testcase.failure: tests/test_export_download_and_sandbox.py:83: in test_sandbox_start_status_proxy assert r.status_code in (200, 201), r.text E AssertionError: {"detail":"backend_did_not_open_port: [sandbox] starting on port 18000 at Wed May 13 23:23:57 2026\n/usr/local/bin/python: No module named uvicorn"} E assert 409 in (200, 201) E + where 409 = <Response [409]>.status_code
